mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort_order
SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission(permission_code, permission_name, resource_type, resource_url, parent_id, sort_order, auth_type, status) VALUES(#{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceUrl}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{authType}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET permission_name = #{permissionName}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, resource_url = #{resourceUrl}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, auth_type = #{authType}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_permission SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
